summary_text: - [CLAUDE.md: Notion登録コマンド例](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/CLAUDE.md#L120) - [schema.py: `PostRecord` + `PostStatus` + required status enum (`draft`)](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/schema.py#L20) - [schema.py: `_REQUIRED_FIELDS` includes `id`, `scheduled_for`, `text`, `status`, `created_at` for validation semantics](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/schema.py#L42) - [notion_sync.py: `_post_record_to_notion_properties()` (`text`, `scheduled_for`, `source_url`, `status` → Notion properties)](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/notion_sync.py#L446) - [notion_sync.py: `push_new_to_notion()`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/notion_sync.py#L626) - [notion_sync.py: `_notion_request()` / `_NOTION_BASE` request path for Notion API](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/notion_sync.py#L47) Minimal invocation pattern: ```bash cd /Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto && python3 -c " from datetime import datetime from notion_sync import push_new_to_notion post = { 'id': 'tmp-001', 'text': '（投稿本文）', 'source_url': 'https://example.com/article', 'scheduled_for': '2026-04-02 10:00', 'status': 'draft', 'created_at': datetime.now().isoformat(), } print(push_new_to_notion(post)) " ```
